paths.name: Admin dashboard retry → admin detail → assign success → close success → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin Dashboard 載入失敗後重試、由儀表板開啟詳情(Admin 視角)、指派/改派成功、狀態關閉成功並多次刷新後登出。

paths.name: Agent take ticket success → detail add internal note → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Agent 工作台載入(有資料)、接手未指派工單成功並刷新、開啟詳情後新增內部備註成功並刷新，再返回工作台並登出。

paths.name: Customer login → list → detail → reply → back → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Guest 進入登入、Customer 登入成功分流、載入工單列表(有資料)、開啟詳情(Customer 視角)、送出客戶回覆成功並刷新、返回列表後登出。

paths.name: Customer register → empty list → create ticket success → refresh → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Guest 註冊成功分流、Customer 列表空狀態、由 Empty 進入建立工單流程並成功、返回列表刷新後登出。

paths.name: Agent set WaitingForCustomer success → public reply success → refresh detail → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Agent 允許的狀態轉換成功(切到 Waiting for Customer)、公開回覆成功、兩次刷新詳情路由後登出。

paths.name: Admin user management deactivate failed → dashboard empty → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 帳號管理停用帳號失敗收斂、返回儀表板後載入空資料狀態並登出。

paths.name: Customer close ticket success → refresh detail → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋客戶關單成功(Closed)並刷新詳情後回列表登出。

paths.name: Create ticket validation failed → fix → submit → system failed → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋建立工單欄位驗證失敗(400)可修正再送出、送出後系統錯誤失敗收斂、回列表後登出。

paths.name: Agent workbench load fail → retry → change filter → empty → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋工作台載入失敗、重試、切換視圖/篩選重新載入，最後空狀態登出。

paths.name: Admin start rejected (Open→In Progress) → refresh → back dashboard → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 AdminStatusChangeFeature 的 Open→In Progress 被拒(startRejected)後回詳情路由刷新，再返回儀表板登出。

paths.name: Customer list load fail → retry → filter reload → open detail forbidden
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Customer 列表載入失敗與重試、Ready 狀態切換篩選重新載入、開啟詳情後在路由層拿到 403 Forbidden 的保密行為。

paths.name: Admin dashboard → create agent account success → open workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 進入管理後台載入成功、進入帳號管理建立客服成功並返回儀表板、再切到工作台檢視並登出。

paths.name: Login rejected → back to login → switch to register → back to login
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋登入失敗收斂(400/401)、返回登入頁保留錯誤、從登入切換到註冊，再從註冊切回登入的導覽不建立 token。

paths.name: Agent status change rejected → back to detail → back workbench
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Agent 在詳情頁嘗試狀態變更但被拒(400/403)的收斂、返回詳情路由重新載入後回工作台。

paths.name: Agent reopen failed → refresh detail → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 AgentStatusChangeFeature 的 Resolved→In Progress 系統錯誤失敗(reopenFailed)與 backToDetail 後重新載入詳情，再回工作台登出。

paths.name: Ticket detail load failed → retry → access as admin → back dashboard → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋詳情載入失敗與重試、成功後進入 Admin 視角渲染、回管理後台再登出。

paths.name: Guest login as Agent → workbench → agent detail → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Agent 登入成功分流(goAgentHome)、進入工作台、開啟詳情(Agent 視角)並登出。

paths.name: Admin login success → dashboard → workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 以帳密登入成功的分流(loginSuccessAsAdmin)與 goAdminHome 導向管理後台，並確認可切到工作台後登出。

paths.name: Admin change role failed → dashboard empty → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋管理員變更角色失敗(changeRoleFailed)後回儀表板，並驗證儀表板可呈現 Empty 狀態後登出。

paths.name: Register rejected → back to register → switch to login
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋註冊失敗(400)返回註冊頁可修正、並可切回登入頁維持 Guest 導覽。

paths.name: Agent take ticket conflict → refresh → workbench empty → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋接手工單的併發衝突(Conflict)收斂、刷新回工作台後空狀態登出。

paths.name: Agent take ticket forbidden → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋接手工單被拒(Forbidden)後回工作台刷新並登出。

paths.name: Agent take ticket failed → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋接手工單系統錯誤失敗(Failed)後回工作台刷新並登出。

paths.name: Customer create ticket forbidden → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋建立工單流程遇到 403 Forbidden 的收斂(backToList)並回列表登出。

paths.name: Admin reopen (Resolved→In Progress) success → refresh → back dashboard → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 AdminStatusChangeFeature 的 Resolved→In Progress 成功(reopenSucceeded)並刷新詳情路由，最後回儀表板登出。

paths.name: Admin assign system failed → back dashboard → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋管理員指派/改派系統錯誤失敗(assignmentFailed)後回詳情路由，並可回到儀表板後登出。

paths.name: Agent internal note failed → refresh detail → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 AgentInternalNoteFeature 內部備註系統錯誤失敗(noteFailed)與 backToDetail 後重新載入詳情，再回工作台登出。

paths.name: Agent public reply rejected → refresh detail → back workbench → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 AgentReplyFeature 公開回覆被拒(replyRejected)與 backToDetail 後路由重新判定，再回工作台登出。

paths.name: Customer close ticket rejected → back to detail → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋客戶關單被拒(狀態不符/非本人等)後回詳情刷新，再回列表登出。

paths.name: Customer close ticket failed → back to detail → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋客戶關單系統錯誤失敗後回詳情刷新，再回列表登出。

paths.name: Customer reply rejected → back to detail → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋客戶回覆被拒(400/403)後回詳情刷新，再回列表並登出。

paths.name: Customer reply failed → back to detail → back list → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋客戶回覆系統錯誤失敗(Failed)後回詳情刷新，再回列表並登出。
